Display.multi_display: Simultaneous LCD and CRT, multiple-monitor support

memory.slots: 2 available sockets (64MB on motherboard, 2 sockets for JEDEC 144-pin SDRAM SO-DIMMs)
memory.features: 64MB or 128MB standard; sockets accessed by removing screw on bottom

display_options: 14.1" TFT XGA 1024x768, 16.7 million simultaneous colors, Active Matrix TFT
13.7" TFT SXGA 1280x1024, 65,536 simultaneous colors, Active Matrix TFT

storage.hdd: 8.1GB / 12ms read / 13ms write, EIDE, removable, S.M.A.R.T., supports two internal disks
storage.optical: Standard or optional: 24X-10X CD-ROM (bootable, hot swap); Standard or optional: 2X DVD drive (16X-8X CD-ROM speed)

Ethernet: None onboard (optional via SelectaBase or PC Card)

Battery.capacity: 3.5 hrs (7 hrs with second battery in UltraBay II)

ports: 2 x PC Card slots (Type I/II/III, CardBus, PCMCIA 2.1, Zoomed Video)
1 x Video in/out (Composite and S-Video, optional on DEVA)
1 x Dolby Digital AC-3 connector (with optional DVD and Enhanced Video Adapter)
Infrared ports (front and back) with IrDA 1.1, up to 4Mbps
audio: CS4239: ISA / SRS 3D audio / FM synthesis / 16-bit playback and record
CS4610: PCI / decodes AC3 into stereo / MPEG-2 audio decoding / acceleration of DirectX
Internal stereo speakers (front, 1W), rotary volume control (right), internal microphone
keyboard: Full-size 85-key keyboard, flat (does not lift up), rear legs pop up (5.5 degrees slope)
TrackPoint with Press-to-Select, Release-to-Select, center click button for scrolling/magnifying glass

physical.weight: 14.1" models: 7.57 lbs (3.43 kg); 13.7" models: 7.63 lbs (3.46 kg) with battery/diskette

security: Phillips-head screws on base for battery and UltraBay II bays
